theme_decision: Dark Theme (Editorial Luxe: Deep Obsidian/Navy & Brass/Gold)

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-white
scale.subtitle: text-lg md:text-xl font-sans text-slate-400 font-light
scale.overline: text-xs font-sans tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-primary-main font-semibold

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#F3D573] text-[#060913] font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-md transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(212,175,55,0.5)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 px-6 py-3 rounded-md transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-sm
buttons.ghost: text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors duration-200

cards.base: bg-[#0D1322] border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6 md:p-8 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300
cards.interactive: bg-[#0D1322] border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6 md:p-8 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 hover:shadow-glow_gold hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer

inputs.base: w-full bg-[#060913] border border-white/10 rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] transition-all

badges.gold: bg-[#D4AF37]/10 text-[#D4AF37] border border-[#D4AF37]/20 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium tracking-wide
badges.neutral: bg-white/5 text-slate-300 border border-white/10 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium tracking-wide

grids.bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
grids.features: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 md:gap-12

hero.layout: Min-h-screen flex items-center pt-32 pb-20 relative overflow-hidden
hero.content: Eyebrow badge (gold), massive H1 (Cormorant Garamond), subtitle, Primary & Secondary CTAs. Abstract gold waves background (low opacity). Product UI screenshot floating/skewed in 3D perspective below the fold.

trusted_by.content: Text: 'TRUSTED BY INNOVATIVE LEGAL TEAMS' (overline). Horizontal marquee of partner logos (rendered in solid white/slate-400 with 50% opacity).

core_capabilities.content: Bento grid layout. Cards for CLM, AI Legal Research, Knowledge Graph, E-signatures, Workflow Automation. Use glass surfaces and gold accents.

interactive_showcase.content: Split layout: Left sticky text (features list), Right scrolling visuals (product UI shots). 'The precision of Big Law. The speed of AI.'

how_it_works.content: Step-by-step linear flow with vertical timeline. Connecting lines in gold. Focus on AI-powered workflow.

security_compliance.content: Dark, technical aesthetic. Monospace elements mixed with Serif. Badges for SOC2, SSO, RBAC. 'Enterprise Grade by Default'.

testimonials.content: Masonry or carousel of elegant quote cards. High-quality professional headshots. Serif quotes.

pricing.content: Enterprise-focused 'Contact Sales' primary path, but elegant tiered cards. Highlight 'Dedicated Knowledge Graph'.

faq.content: Accordion style. Clean typography. Border-bottom only for items.

cta.content: Massive typography 'Ready to upgrade your practice?'. Primary button. Subtle abstract background.

footer.content: 5-column grid. Branding, Product, Company, Legal, Contact. Subtle copyright text.

auth_screens.layout: Split screen or elegant centered card with blurred background.
auth_screens.visuals: Left/Background: Architectural/abstract dark luxury image with overlay. Right/Center: Glassmorphism auth panel.
auth_screens.elements: Logo, 'Sign In to LawyerOS', Google/Microsoft/SAML SSO buttons (styled elegantly with white borders), 'OR' divider, Email/Password fields, 'Forgot Password', Submit button.

sidebar.layout: w-64 fixed inset-y-0 left-0 bg-[#060913] border-r border-white/10 flex flex-col z-40
sidebar.content: Top: LawyerOS Logo. Middle: Scrollable rich nav (Dashboard, Contracts, Templates, Clauses, Matters, Negotiations, Approvals, Review Queue, Obligations, Counterparties, Renewals, Playbook, Research, Knowledge Graph, Diligence, Signatures, Analytics, Agent, Invoices, Requests, Team, Settings, Admin). Bottom: User profile.

topbar.layout: h-16 fixed top-0 right-0 left-64 bg-[#060913]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between px-6 z-30

dashboard_content.layout: pt-24 pl-72 pr-8 pb-12 min-h-screen bg-[#0A0F1C]
dashboard_content.content: Page Header ('Good morning, Counsel'). KPI Cards (Active Matters, Pending Approvals, Risk Alerts). Split view below: Activity Feed (left) vs Upcoming Obligations/Renewals (right). Recent Contracts table.

motion.principles: Subtle, restrained, purposeful. Avoid bouncy or overly playful animations. Opt for slow fades, elegant slides, and smooth scaling.
motion.hover_states: Buttons lift slightly (`-translate-y-0.5`). Cards glow borders faintly (`hover:border-white/20`).
motion.page_transitions: Fade in with a slight upward translation (`translate-y-4` to `0`, opacity 0 to 1 over 600ms ease-out).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards against the deep obsidian background. Use text-slate-300 for body text to maintain readability while softening the contrast compared to pure white.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring, utilizing the gold accent (`focus:ring-[#D4AF37]`).
accessibility.aria: Use semantic HTML. Ensure custom UI components (like the custom navigation and dropdowns) have correct ARIA roles.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="auth-login-button"`).

hero_background.description: Abstract dark gold waves for hero overlay
Golden light streaks for CTA or section backgrounds

architectural.description: Dark modern glass building looking up

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use framer-motion for smooth, high-end 2D interactions. Avoid heavy WebGL/Three.js unless specifically creating an abstract knowledge-graph visualization. A lightweight use of TSParticles with subtle gold connections could represent the AI Knowledge Graph in a specific section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI using React, TailwindCSS, and Shadcn UI components.
Add the Google Fonts import for 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Inter' in the main index.css or index.html.
Ensure the application supports the new rich sidebar navigation for the App Shell.
All components should be written in JavaScript (.js or .jsx), NOT TypeScript (.tsx).
Replace generic default aesthetics with the strict Obsidian/Gold palette. Absolutely no 'Stripe blue' or 'Vercel white'.
Use framer-motion for section entrance animations (fade up gently) to sell the 'premium' feel.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons. Use lucide-react or phosphor-icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it. Example: Dropdown with transparent background.
